## Verses (26)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O give praise to the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | O give praise to the God of gods: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | O give praise to the Lord of lords: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | To him who only does great wonders: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | To him who by wisdom made the heavens: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | To him by whom the earth was stretched out over the waters: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | To him who made great lights: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The sun to have rule by day: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | The moon and the stars to have rule by night: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | To him who put to death the first-fruits of Egypt: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | And took out Israel from among them: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | With a strong hand and an outstretched arm: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | To him who made a way through the Red Sea: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | And let Israel go through it: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | By him Pharaoh and his army were overturned in the Red Sea: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | To him who took his people through the waste land: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | To him who overcame great kings: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | And put noble kings to death: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Sihon, king of the Amorites: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | And Og, king of Bashan: for his mercy is unchanging for ever: | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | And gave their land to his people for a heritage: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Even a heritage for his servant Israel: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | Who kept us in mind when we were in trouble: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | And has taken us out of the hands of our haters: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Who gives food to all flesh: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | O give praise to the God of heaven: for his mercy is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
